content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the car well-centered on the straight portion just before the curve begins.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 16 + 5 = 21
Waypoint 21: (6.204955, 0.686169)
Car position: (5.441679, 0.659447)
Bearing = atan2(0.686169 - 0.659447, 6.204955 - 5.441679) = atan2(0.026722, 0.763276) ≈ 2.00°
Delta = 2.00 - (-1.034) = 3.03° → nearly straight, tiny left bias, no correction needed
